name: Streamex Corp.
description: Streamex Corp. is a real-world asset tokenization company that provides institutional-grade infrastructure designed to bring the gold and commodities markets on-chain. By utilizing a gold-denominated treasury and advanced tokenization technology, the company focuses on building a platform that delivers regulated, yield-bearing, and liquid financial products. Streamex aims to modernize the commodities market by bridging traditional assets with digital financial solutions, offering investors access to transparent and efficient investment vehicles within a secure, regulated framework. The company is headquartered in the United States and is publicly traded on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol STEX.
